name: thomasguntenaar-com-site
description: Cloudflare Pages deploy MUST be npm run deploy — never npx wrangler deploy (Workers only; breaks on Pages).

scripts.build:site: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && if [ -d assets ]; then cp -r assets dist/; fi
scripts.deploy: npm run build:site && npm run deploy:pages
